title: Reaching the Stars
description: A space-themed modpack focusing on Oritech, Stellaris, and Stargate Journeys. Reach the stars to unlock the revamped End!
body:
![Reaching the Stars title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c44c5bc252a23a4aea9450b69e9190a1cde4213.png)

[Warning] Put on indefinite hiatus!

Build a factory with Oritech and use the resources to make a spaceship. Use it to explore the solar system, get new resources from the planets, and use them to locate and reactivate a stargate to explore beyond the confines of our star. Collect unique eyes from across the planets and open a portal to the End!

### Extra Features:
This modpack comes bundled with multiple shaderpacks, including one which is enabled by default: [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader) by [ukrech](https://modrinth.com/user/ukrech). This is an extremely lightweight shader which should work on any computer. (Yes, including MacOS)

This modpack includes [Mods Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/mods-optimizer) by [Kaworru](https://modrinth.com/user/Kaworru) for easy server setup. No downloading seperate serverfiles, just drop all the same files from the normal modpack into your neoforge server and watch as It Just Works.


### External Credits:
Main menu button textures from [Space and Stars GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/space-and-stars-gui) by [Irvis](https://modrinth.com/user/Irvis)

Includes [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax)
